metadata.description: Personal collection of agent skills. Code review, productivity, security, and more. Model agnostic.

plugins.name: ts-review
plugins.description: Opinionated TypeScript / JavaScript code review skills. Auto-detects stack (Next.js, React, Drizzle, next-safe-action, Zod, Tailwind, Vitest, etc.) and applies only rules for tools in use. Single-agent (/ts-review) and 5-parallel-subagent (/ts-review-multi-agent) variants. Manual invocation only.

plugins.name: java-review
plugins.description: Opinionated Java code review skills (Spring Boot-focused). Auto-detects stack (Spring Boot starters, JPA, Lombok, Vavr, Resilience4j, Spock, RabbitMQ, etc.) and applies only rules for tools in use. Single-agent (/java-review) and 5-parallel-subagent (/java-review-multi-agent) variants. Manual invocation only.

plugins.name: dependabot-review
plugins.description: Review one or more open Dependabot PRs for security and breaking-change impact. Returns per-PR risk verdict and suggested merge order. Manual invocation only.

plugins.name: dependabot-batch-updates-pr
plugins.description: Triage and batch-process Dependabot updates on a GitHub repo: open Dependabot PRs plus vulnerability alerts that have no PR. Severity-filtered (default high+critical, prompt for medium+low). Cherry-picks open PRs as clean linear commits on a dedicated branch. Manual invocation only.

plugins.name: supply-chain-scan
plugins.description: Scan project dependencies (incl. transitive) for supply-chain risks: typosquats, suspicious postinstalls, recent ownership changes, known IOCs. Manual invocation only.

plugins.name: docs
plugins.description: Enforce documentation conventions: README structure, heading hierarchy, code-block language tags, link health, ADR format, changelog discipline. Auto-triggers on doc edits.

plugins.name: productivity
plugins.description: General non-code productivity: drafting, summarizing, triaging, planning. Auto-triggers when relevant.
